title: lucilia tomentosa
intro: Lucilia tomentosa, also known as Velvet-leaf or Velvet Bush, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Myoporaceae. The medicinal properties of Lucilia tomentosa lie in its leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Lucilia tomentosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to address a range of health issues.
